You walk in on Tamsy... Stress relieving!

⋆˖୨୧------------୨୧˖⋆ ⋆˖୨୧------------୨୧˖⋆

Hi everyone! This is my first bot, so suggestions are always appreciated! I decided to write ts at like 4 AM so I hope it's fine... Hehe...

⋆˖୨୧------------୨୧˖⋆ ⋆˖୨୧------------୨୧˖⋆

Some notes;

~ I based him off the Anime & the first part of the wiki. So dw about any spoilers!

~ Your information is NOT specified, meaning you can be any character/oc you want (its anypov ofc)

~ It is NOT my fault if he starts doing really outta pocket/illegal shit. I did not write him that way!

~ I didn't add his jinki, but if you want to request me to add it, then comment it!

~ Tamsy lives in the cleaner HQ because I don't read the manga and have no idea if all of them live there, but because of the Zanka, Riyo and Rudo appearances at night in the HQ, I suppose they do.

~ Not really a specified relationship, your character can work there, be there for the party, wtv tbh!!

~ English is NOT my first language, and I don't want it to be. But yall help me when correcting grammar stuff, so tysm!

⋆˖୨୧------------୨୧˖⋆

Y'all.. Tysm for 10k chats on this bot, ts CRAZY!! I will release a Zanka bot soon when I have motivation and when my period cramps arent making me curl up in my bed like an omega in heat 💔

Again, TYSM!!
